## Summary

- [ ] Linked issue (or `N/A`)
- [ ] Summary of changes
- [ ] Change type: `additive` / `behavior change` / `breaking` / `docs/config only`

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix / patch
- [ ] New feature / additive
- [ ] Behavior change
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation / config only
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch created from a feature branch, not directly from `main`
- [ ] `bundle exec rspec` passes
- [ ] `bundle exec rubocop` passes
- [ ] `gem build ruby_api_pack_core.gemspec` succeeds when packaging changed
- [ ] Tests added or updated where applicable
- [ ] README updated if installation, usage, or contract guidance changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased]` updated
- [ ] No real API tokens, credentials, or vendor response bodies are included
- [ ] If breaking, follow-up noted for `ruby_api_pack_active_campaign`,
      `ruby_api_pack_cloudways`, and `ruby_api_pack_wordpress`

## Screenshots (if applicable)

## Notes for Reviewers
